title: Class 0 E003 smoke emergency scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative E003-aligned smoke-detected emergency path. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with canonical assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish an E003 smoke-detected emergency payload through the registry-aligned emergency ingress plane or a controlled bridge that produces policy-router-compatible input.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the emergency routing outcome.

notes: Dedicated E003 smoke-detected payload fixture now available in sample_policy_router_input_class0_e003_smoke.json.
This scenario validates smoke-detected state trigger semantics and is aligned with the required experiments document's canonical emergency family coverage.
Class 0 emergency handling must not use the LLM as the primary decision path.
doorbell_detected is not emergency evidence and does not authorize doorlock control.
